tagline: Your pool should be an oasis where great memories are made year-round.

hero.headline:
Your Backyard Oasis, Perfected by
225+ Happy Families
hero.subheadline: For 18 years, Thousand Oaks families have trusted Stanton Pools for stunning remodels, reliable weekly care, and honest pricing. Owner Eric Stanton personally oversees every project so you get the backyard you deserve.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Remodeling &<br class="hidden md:block">Care for Southern California
services.subtitle: From full-scale renovations to weekly maintenance, our licensed specialist teams handle every detail so your pool stays beautiful year-round.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Resurfacing
cards.description: Complete pool renovations including plaster and pebble resurfacing, new tile and coping, copper-to-PVC plumbing conversions, and full equipment upgrades.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly care including chemical balancing, skimmer and pump basket emptying, equipment checks, netting, vacuuming, and wall brushing.

cards.title: Spa Additions
cards.description: Custom spa additions to your existing pool with full plumbing, electrical, and finishing work. Create the ultimate backyard relaxation experience.

cards.title: Structural Crack Repair
cards.description: Expert structural crack repair to restore your pool's integrity and prevent further damage using professional techniques and quality materials.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Pump repair, energy-efficient variable speed installations, heater replacement, salt water conversions, and Wi-Fi remote system setup.

cards.title: Custom Pool Features
cards.description: Baja shelves, deck jets, LED lighting, custom tile accents, and umbrella holders to transform your pool into a personal resort.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and your vision. Eric will visit your home, assess your pool, and provide an honest, detailed quote within 24 hours. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Handle Every Detail
steps.description: Our licensed specialist teams manage your project from start to finish. Eric personally oversees every phase, keeping you updated with clear communication throughout.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool is transformed into the backyard retreat you've always wanted. We stand behind our work and stay available for ongoing maintenance and support.

about.label: Why Thousand Oaks Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated Since 2008, Backed by 225+ Five-Star Reviews
about.description: Eric Stanton founded Stanton Pools in 2008 after graduating from USC with a business degree and one clear mission: treat every pool like his own. Eighteen years later, that commitment has earned 250+ five-star reviews across Google, Yelp, HomeAdvisor, Facebook, and Nextdoor. With dual C-53 and D-35 contractor licenses and Health Department water chemistry certification, our dedicated specialist teams deliver the craftsmanship and communication that Thousand Oaks families count on.

features.title: Owner On Every Project
features.description: Eric Stanton personally oversees every remodel and responds to every client within 24 hours. You're never handed off to a stranger.

features.title: Dual Licensed & Certified
features.description: We hold both C-53 and D-35 contractor licenses plus Health Department water chemistry certification — the highest standard in pool work.

features.title: Fair, Upfront Pricing Always
features.description: No hidden costs, no surprise charges. You get a detailed written quote before work begins, and that's the price you pay. Period.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project starts with a detailed written quote. No hidden fees, no change-order games. Just honest pricing from a company that values your trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Backyard Oasis" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service or project phase, call Eric directly. We'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. With 225+ five-star reviews and 18 years in business, our reputation is built on keeping that promise every single time.

faqs.question: How long does a typical pool remodel take?
faqs.answer: Most pool remodels take 2-4 weeks depending on scope. Eric will give you a detailed timeline during your free consultation and keep you updated throughout the project. We work efficiently without cutting corners.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Thousand Oaks, Westlake Village, Woodland Hills, Newbury Park, Simi Valley, Agoura Hills, Calabasas, Encino, Sherman Oaks, and the greater Los Angeles and Ventura County areas.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold both C-53 and D-35 California contractor licenses (#1009474), are Health Department certified for water chemistry, and carry full liability insurance. Your project is in fully credentialed hands.

faqs.question: Can I see examples of your past work?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We have hundreds of completed remodel photos with before-and-after galleries. Ask Eric during your consultation or check our website and social media pages for recent projects.

faqs.question: Do you offer weekly pool maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our weekly maintenance service includes complete chemical balancing, equipment checks, skimming, vacuuming, brushing, and surface integrity inspections. Many remodel clients become long-term maintenance customers.

testimonials.name: Karen J.
testimonials.text: Stanton Pools was communicative, professional, and overall very attentive. I love my pool. Eric made the entire process easy and the results exceeded what I imagined.

testimonials.name: David W.
testimonials.text: Best contractor experience in my lifetime. Demo crew, tile workers, pebble installation, start-up, follow-up. Every phase was perfect. I recommend Stanton Pools to everyone.

testimonials.name: Joshua M.
testimonials.text: Eric and his team did an absolutely exceptional job on our pool renovation and I can't recommend Stanton Pools enough. The attention to detail was remarkable from start to finish.
